---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ShareClaw
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem. Example: "When using ShareClaw with CrewAI, I have to manually..."

## Proposed solution

How you think this should work. Include code examples if possible:

```python
from shareclaw import Brain
brain = Brain("my-project")
# your proposed API here
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they don't work as well.

## Does this change the core?

- [ ] Yes, this requires changes to `shareclaw/core.py`
- [ ] No, this can be an integration/example/protocol

Note: Changes that add dependencies to the core or break the single-file simplicity are unlikely to be accepted. Consider whether your feature can live in `examples/` or `protocols/` instead.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
